title: Custom Compostable Coffee Pouches
product_description: Need suppliers for custom printed compostable stand-up coffee pouches with one-way degassing valve, matte finish, and zipper closure. Initial quantity 25,000 units, ship to Austin, Texas. Require food-safe compliance documents and lead time under 8 weeks.

title: Private Label Stainless Steel Bottles
product_description: Source manufacturers for 750ml double-wall stainless steel vacuum bottles with private label logo and custom retail packaging. Initial pilot order 5,000 units with ramp to 30,000 quarterly. Delivery target is Los Angeles, CA, budget should support mid-tier quality.

title: Biodegradable E-commerce Mailers
product_description: Find suppliers for biodegradable polymailer alternatives for D2C apparel shipments. Sizes: 10x13 and 14.5x19 inches, white + one-color branding. Need stable monthly supply around 100,000 units and certifications proving compostability and material safety.

title: Low-Volume PCB Assembly Partner
product_description: Looking for contract manufacturers who can handle low-to-mid volume PCB assembly for IoT sensor boards, including SMT assembly, testing, and RoHS compliance. First order 1,500 boards with recurring monthly batches. Must support engineering communication in English and ship to New York.

title: Organic Cotton Branded Tote Bags
product_description: Need ethical suppliers for organic cotton tote bags with two-color screen print logo for retail stores. Quantity 40,000 units split across three deliveries over a quarter. Looking for suppliers with social compliance certifications and realistic landed cost estimates for US East Coast delivery.
